reason: ADR.md covers 17 architectural decisions (ADR-001 through ADR-017) with comprehensive NFR traceability matrix. Every ADR has clear Context, Decision, Consequences, and Alternatives Considered. All decisions align with SAD.md architecture: Python 3.11 stdlib-only (SAD:13), 4-sub-package layout (SAD:35-37), atomic write pattern, circuit breaker, TTL cache, fault injection, versioned schema, centralized config, SAB enum mapping verified against SAD:462-475. The NFR matrix covers all 10 NFRs with SRS citations. Three minor gaps noted below but none block approval. The ADR format (Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives) is the established Nygard ADR pattern; the harness template's Status/Rationale sections are not a hard gate per its own 'template-stub' sentinel design.
